Revlon Colorstay Limitless Matte Lipstick delivers up to 24HR wear, a no budge lightweight matte finish and a 100% vegan formula. The concentrated pigment blend gives you an inense burst of matte colour that dries down to a super lightweight finish, it feels barely there.
Infused with Triple Hyaluronic Acid to dramtically increase hydration + Upcycled Cranberry Extract to protect lips with a non tightening feel. This 100% vegan formula is safe for sensitive lips.

Available in 16 shades to suit your skin undertone.

Meet Lifter Glaze Oil Balm: for lips so smooth + glowy-they're glazed, Now you can glaze lips in melty goodness. Formulated with Hyaluronic Acid + Acerola Cherry Extract. Up to 24H hydration you crave, lip lines visibly reduced by 20%*. *Cosmeto-clinical study, 45 subjects, after 4 weeks
  • Lifter Glaze Oil Balm is formulated with Hyaluronic Acid + Acerola Cherry Extract and hydrates lips for 24H.

  • This oil balm melts to lips for a glazed, smooth look and ultra-comfortable feel.

  • 24H hydration, fuller look. This lip glaze leaves lips feeling smooth and moisturized all day. Now, your lips stay glazed with lip lines visibly reduced by 20%* , and after 4 weeks of daily use lips feel softer, and look smoother + healthier. *Cosmeto-clinical study, 45 subjects, after 4 weeks.

Plus, it's formulated with Hyaluronic Acid + Acerola Cherry Extract and it has glazed pigments. *Cosmeto-clinical study, 45 subjects, after 4 weeks.

  • This hydrating lip balm has glazed pigments that tint lips in sheer, buildable color. Lifter Glaze is available in 10 glazed shades that last, and with 24-hour hydration that you crave.

Drench your lips with a juicy burst of nourishing glossy shine using the new Oh My Gloss! An addictive hybrid sensation on the lips! Replenish your lips with a rich oil that combines the glossy finish of a lip gloss with the moisture boost of a lip balm while leaving a hint of irresistible sheer colour in 5 mouthwatering juicy flavours.
- A lip-hugging formula infused with a blend of moisture actives and antioxidants that hydrates, comforts, and leaves your lips looking irresistible soft, silky smooth and naturally plumped
- Glides on effortlessly making it easy to apply in just one swipe, this lip oil comes with a doe-foot applicator
- Clear, non-sticky formula
- A cruelty-free and vegan formula, available in 5 juicy shades, that will keep your lips instantly hydrated and nourished for soft, smooth lips
- Key active ingredients include coconut oil for intense hydration & comfort; raspberry seed oil & passion fruit oil for extra moisturising benefits that hydrate, comfort and smooth lips; Vitamin E which replenishes, restores, and protects the lips
  • Natural glossy non-sticky finish with cruelty-free, gluten-free, vegan formula

  • Soft doe-foot applicator

  • 6 mouthwatering juicy flavours

  • Blend of lip-hugging actives that hydrates, comforts, and leaves lips instantly nourished, smooth and plumped

ingredients: ETHYL ACETATE, BUTYL ACETATE, NITROCELLULOSE, ACRYLATES/HYDROXYESTERS ACRYLATES COPOLYMER, ACETYL TRIBUTYL CITRATE, ISOPROPYL ALCOHOL, TOSYLAMIDE/EPOXY RESIN, n-BUTYL ALCOHOL, ACETYLATED HYDROGENATED CASTOR GLYCERIDE, STEARALKONIUM HECTORITE, BENZOPHENONE-1, CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE, METHYL METHACRYLATE CROSSPOLYMER, DIMETHICONE, APIUM GRAVEOLENS (CELERY) SEED EXTRACT, CITRIC ACID, AQUA/WATER/EAU, ADIPIC ACID/NEOPENTYL GLYCOL/TRIMELLITIC ANHYDRIDE COPOLYMER, AMETHYST EXTRACT, BIOTIN, TOCOPHEROL, LEUCONOSTOC/RADISH ROOT FERMENT FILTRATE, [May Contain/Peut Contenir/ +/-:TITANIUM DIOXIDE (CI 77891), D&C RED NO. 34 CALCIUM LAKE (CI 15880), D&C VIOLET NO. 2 (CI 60725), D&C RED NO. 7 CALCIUM LAKE (CI 15850), FERRIC AMMONIUM FERROCYANIDE (CI 77510)].
long_description:
Dare to go bare with Sally Hansen's new Repair + Rescue treatment collection. A skincare-inspired, clinically and consumer tested collection that visibly improves the overall appearance of your nails. Sally Hansen's new Repair + Rescue Super Strength Defense will instantly fortify and is clinically and consumer tested to strengthen fragile nails in just 1 week*. This strengthener, containing Amethyst, imparts a flexible, protective barrier onto the nails, helping nails feel harder, stronger, and resistant to breakage while enhancing the nail's natural appearance.
  • Clinically proven to strengthen nails in 1 week*.

  • Helps nails feel harder, stronger, and resistant to breakage.

  • Contains Amethyst for a flexible and protective barrier.

  • Enhances nails natural appearance.

  • *Based on instrumental measurements after 4 uses in 1 week.
name: Repair & Rescue Super Strength Defence

description: PIKSTERS INTERDENTAL BRUSH SIZE 1 SMALL 10PK
long_description:
Piksters Interdental Brushes clean the areas between your teeth more effectively than a normal toothbrush alone.

Effective plaque removal
Piksters Interdental Brushes easily get into and clean tight areas of the mouth where a toothbrush cannot reach. The spaces between teeth can conceal parts of the tooth surface, by cleaning in the spaces you get the advantage of helping reduce decay. These small size 1 brushes are ideal for small tooth gaps and inside gum pockets. Each brush features an extended purple handle and a flexible head for easy access to your molars and comfortable cleaning at any angle. The brush head consists of strong & stiff plastic-coated wire covered in soft, space-filling bristles to effectively trap and scrub away food particles and dental plaque.

Like dental floss, only easier!
Regular plaque removal through brushing and flossing is essential for oral health and hygiene, helping to prevent tooth decay and bad breath. Easier to use than regular dental floss, Piksters Interdental Brushes are a convenient, beginner-friendly alternative to flossing and a great way to make flossing a part of your daily routine. The bristles make interdental brushes especially effective for interproximal plaque removal, as they can get into the indents and crevices on the surfaces between your back teeth in a way that regular floss cannot.

Piksters Interdental Brushes are durable for reuse like a toothbrush. Made with superior, strong wire to help prevent buckling.
  • Recommended by more than 90% of dental professionals

  • Clean between teeth where a toothbrush cannot reach

  • Like dental floss, only easier!

  • Prevent plaque build up

  • Promote gum health

  • Protective caps that can act as a handle extension.

  • Reusable interdental brushes.

  • Strong, stiff wire to help prevent buckling.
name: Interdental Brushes Purple Size 1

long_description:
Regular flossing is the key to great dental hygiene. Use Piksters SupaGRIP Eco Floss Picks to keep your mouth happy by removing plaque and bacteria along your gum line and in between your teeth. With their sturdy handles and D-shaped design, these floss picks allow you to easily get into those hard-to-reach places and perform the function of a toothpick as needed. Say goodbye to traditional dental floss and try Piksters SupaGRIP Eco Floss Picks, the easy way to floss.

description: PIKSTERS INTERDENTAL BRUSH SIZE 000 10 PACK
long_description:
Piksters Interdental Brushes clean the areas between your teeth more effectively than a normal toothbrush alone.

Effective plaque removal
Piksters Interdental Brushes easily get into and clean tight areas of the mouth where a toothbrush cannot reach. The spaces between teeth can conceal parts of the tooth surface, by cleaning in the spaces you get the advantage of helping reduce decay. These ultra-fine size 000 brushes are ideal for ultra-small tooth gaps and inside gum pockets. Each brush features an extended navy handle and a flexible head for easy access to your molars and comfortable cleaning at any angle. The brush head consists of strong & stiff plastic-coated wire covered in soft, space-filling bristles to effectively trap and scrub away food particles and dental plaque. The fine wire of size 000 can bend if forced between teeth - use a gentle twisting/wiggling motion for extremely small tooth gaps only.

Like dental floss, only easier!
Regular plaque removal through brushing and flossing is essential for oral health and hygiene, helping to prevent tooth decay and bad breath. Easier to use than regular floss, Piksters Interdental Brushes are a convenient, beginner-friendly alternative to flossing and a great way to make flossing a part of your daily routine. The bristles make interdental brushes especially effective for interproximal plaque removal, as they can get into the indents and crevices on the surfaces between your back teeth in a way that regular floss cannot.

Piksters Interdental Brushes are durable for reuse like a toothbrush. Made with superior, strong wire to help prevent buckling.
  • Recommended by more than 90% of dental professionals

  • Clean between teeth where a toothbrush cannot reach

  • Protective caps that can act as a handle extension.

  • The fine wire of size 000 can bend if forced between teeth - use a gentle twisting/wiggling motion for extremely small tooth gaps only.

long_description:
Enamel is the tooth's thin outer surface that keeps teeth strong, healthy and protects the dentine. Enamel wear is when the outer layer of the teeth erodes, and the underlying yellow dentine is exposed. Acids in everyday foods and drinks can weaken and wear away your tooth enamel. Over time, this can lead to sensitive teeth.

DUAL ACTION ENAMEL PROTECTION + SENSITIVITY RELIEF: Sensodyne Sensitivity & Enamel Whitening Toothpaste has a dual action formula which helps restore enamel strength and relieve teeth sensitivity.

HELPS RESTORE ENAMEL STRENGTH: The fluoride optimised formulation helps to restore enamel strength by driving more fluoride into the enamel layer. It starts to actively strengthen enamel from 1st use.

Sensodyne Sensitivity & Enamel Whitening Toothpaste contains fluoride for daily enamel protection against acid erosion. It also contains Potassium nitrate that works deep inside the tooth to help calm painful sensitivity and provide 24/7* sensitivity protection.
  • Dual action sensitivity relief and enamel protection

  • Works deep inside the tooth to help calm painful sensitivity, providing 24/7 sensitivity protection with twice daily brushing.

What is tooth sensitivity?
Sensitivity can occur when the dentine underneath tooth enamel and gums becomes exposed. When exposed dentine comes into contact with hot or cold, sweet or sour, or even your toothbrush, it can trigger the nerve causing a short sharp pain.

Why use Sensodyne Repair & Protect Whitening?
It helps to repair* the sensitive areas of the teeth. Brush twice a day for lasting sensitivity protection, and helps to restore the natural whiteness of your teeth. It also contains fluoride to help strengthen the teeth.

Colgate Optic White Renewal Vibrant Clean Teeth Whitening Toothpaste removes 10 years of yellow stains*

Did you know that yellow stains, as well as other types of stains, can build up on the inside as well as the outside of your teeth? Colgate Optic White Renewal contains 3% hydrogen peroxide, which is clinically proven to whiten your teeth inside and out. Take years off your smile with Colgate Optic White Renewal. Causes of tooth discolouration - certain foods and beverages can cause teeth to become discoloured. These include coffee, tea and wine. Smoking also causes teeth to become discoloured.

Types of teeth stains:
1. Extrinsic Stains - an extrinsic tooth stain is a stain on the outer part of the tooth. These stains make their home on your enamel, which is the layer that protects the softer part of the tooth (dentine) underneath. Enamel comes into contact with everything you eat or drink and can adsorb some of the pigment over time, causing a stain.

2. Intrinsic Stains - intrinsic stains happen when pigments become incorporated in the enamel structure. Dentine is naturally darker and more yellow in colour than enamel. Dentine is more visible when enamel is thinned or worn down from abrasion, which can result from hard toothbrushing; or erosion, which can occur from the ingestion of acidic foods and drinks amongst other things.

Teeth whitening treatments - there are many at-home treatment options available including using a whitening toothpaste, mouthwash or whitening pen. Colgate Optic White toothpastes contain hydrogen peroxide. Hydrogen peroxide works by removing extrinsic and intrinsic stains. Other whitening toothpastes use high cleaning silica, which helps to remove surface stains on the outer layer of the teeth.

*With twice daily brushing for 4 weeks. Individual results may vary

  • REVEAL A WHITER LOOKING SMILE: Colgate Optic White Renewal Vibrant Clean is a teeth whitening toothpaste for a whiter smile

  • REMOVES STAINS: Colgate Optic White Renewal toothpaste removes 10 years of yellow stains with twice daily brushing

long_description:
We believe you deserve a life that's free from tooth sensitivity. That's why helping you to get instant^ relief and lasting protection matters to us - because we're here to keep you smiling.

How does Colgate Sensitive Pro-Relief Whitening toothpaste work?
- It works by plugging the channels that lead to sensitive tooth nerves, to block the pain.
- With regular use, it builds a long-lasting protective barrier that acts like a seal against sensitivity.

Colgate Sensitive Pro-Relief Whitening Toothpaste:
- Has a low abrasive formula that gently and effectively removes stains, helping to restore the natural whiteness of your teeth.
- Removes plaque with brushing and prevents tartar build-up
- Strengthens tooth enamel and protects against cavities

Where does sensitive tooth pain come from?
- Receding gums and damage to your enamel can expose thousands of microscopic channels which lead to your tooth's nerve centre.
- When your teeth make contact with something hot, cold or sweet, sensations are carried down these channels directly to the nerves, causing teeth pain.

For instant relief, apply directly to each sensitive tooth with finger tip and gently massage for 1 minute, up to twice daily.
For lasting relief, apply to a gentle toothbrush making sure to brush all sensitive areas of teeth. Brush twice daily.

Colgate Sensitive Pro-Relief Toothpaste is vegan, sugar free, gluten free and responsibly made*
Pack Size: 110g

For the relief of sensitive teeth. ALWAYS READ THE LABEL AND FOLLOW THE DIRECTIONS FOR USE. Do not swallow. Do not use in children 6 years of age or less. For children 7 to 12 years of age, use only on the advice of a dentist or doctor. Sensitive teeth may indicate an underlying problem that may need prompt care by a dentist if pain persists.

^After application as directed.
*our products are made at Colgate-Palmolive facilities that are increasing energy and water efficiency, driving towards zero waste, striving for no workplace accidents, and adhering to ethical labor practices
  • SENSITIVITY RELIEF: Colgate Sensitive Pro-Relief Whitening Toothpaste provides clinically proven instant and lasting relief for sensitive teeth.

  • PRO-ARGIN TECHNOLOGY: Clinically proven amino acid formula with Pro-Argin technology to provide sensitivity relief.

  • WHITENING: Gently removes stains and helps restore the natural whiteness of your teeth.

  • FOR INSTANT RELIEF: Apply directly to each sensitive tooth with finger tip and gently massage for 1 minute, up to twice daily. (Instant relief after application and as directed).

description: COLGATE ACTIVE REPAIR GUM PROTECT TOOTHPASTE 110G
ingredients: Calcium Carbonate, Purified Water, Sorbitol, Arginine, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Flavour, Sodium Monofluorophosphate, Zinc Phosphate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Carmellose Sodium, Sodium Bicarbonate, Tetrasiduym Pyrophosphate, Saccharin Sodium, Benzyl Alcohol, Xanthan Gum, Sucralose.
long_description:
Clinically proven Pro-Argin technology seals and repairs sensitive teeth areas for effective pain relief
- Exposed dentine tubules are the pathways to sensitivity pain.
- Pro-Argin technology blocks exposed dentine tubules for instant (after application as directed) relief.
- Over time, it builds a protective shield that acts like a seal and helps prevent sensitivity from coming back.

Colgate Sensitive Pro-Relief Active Repair Enamel Strength. With added zinc phosphate for faster repair and enhanced acid resistance.
Size: 110g

Directions for use:
For instant relief, apply directly to each sensitive tooth with finger tip and gently massage for 1 minute, up to twice daily.
For lasting relief, apply to a gentle toothbrush making sure to brush all sensitive areas of teeth. Brush twice daily.

Sensitive teeth may indicate an underlying problem that may need prompt care by a dentist if pain persists. DO NOT USE in children 6 years of age or less. For children 7 to 12 years of age, use only on the advice of a dentist or doctor. Do not swallow. Rinse with a small amount of water.

Faster build-up of protective layer vs. Colgate Sensitive Pro-Relief Toothpaste without Zinc Phosphate
^After application as directed

  • SENSITIVITY RELIEF: Colgate Sensitive Pro-Relief Enamel Strength Toothpaste provides clinically proven instant^ and lasting relief for sensitive teeth.

  • PRO-ARGIN TECHNOLOGY: Clinically proven Pro-argin technology seals and repairs sensitive teeth areas for effective pain relief.

  • ENAMEL REPAIR: Added zinc phosphate for faster repair and enhanced acid resistance

  • FOR INSTANT RELIEF: Apply directly to each sensitive tooth with finger tip and gently massage for 1 minute, up to twice daily. (Instant relief after application and as directed).

  • LASTING RELIEF: Apply to a gentle toothbrush making sure to brush all sensitive areas of teeth. Brush twice daily.
name: Active Repair Gum Protect Toothpaste

long_description:
Sensodyne Repair & Protect Whitening is a daily fluoride toothpaste that helps to repair* the sensitive areas of the teeth, with twice daily brushing. It helps to restore the natural whiteness of your teeth.
Sensodyne Repair & Protect, powered by NOVAMIN, is a calcium sodium phosphosilicate formulation. With twice daily brushing, it helps repair* sensitive areas with the natural building blocks of teeth.

What is tooth sensitivity?
Sensitivity can occur when the dentine underneath tooth enamel and gums becomes exposed. When exposed dentine comes into contact with hot or cold, sweet or sour, or even your toothbrush, it can trigger the nerve causing a short sharp pain.

Why use Sensodyne Repair & Protect Whitening?
It helps to repair* the sensitive areas of the teeth. Brush twice a day for lasting sensitivity protection, and helps to restore the natural whiteness of your teeth. It also contains fluoride to help strengthen the teeth.

*Forms a protective layer over the sensitive areas of the teeth. Brush twice a day for lasting sensitivity protection.
~With twice daily brushing.

  • Also contains fluoride to help strengthen the teeth

  • Powered by Novamin

  • With twice daily brushing it helps repair sensitive areas with the natural building blocks of teeth

  • Whitening - helps restore the natural whiteness of your teeth

  • #1 Brand for Sensitive Teeth**IQVIA & NielsenIQ RMS Sell Out Service, Toothpaste Sensitive Segment (client defined) Australia Grocery and Pharmacy market MAT to 30/08/2022.

long_description:
Colgate Optic White Renewal Lasting Fresh Teeth Whitening Toothpaste removes 10 years of yellow stains*.

Did you know that yellow stains, as well as other types of stains, can build up on the inside as well as the outside of your teeth? Colgate Optic White Renewal contains 3% hydrogen peroxide, which is clinically proven to whiten your teeth inside and out. Take years off your smile with Colgate Optic White Renewal. Helps to remove stains from coffee, wine and soft drinks.

- Remove 10 years of yellow stains*
- Powered by Hydrogen Peroxide, the whitening ingredient dentists use
- Proven to deeply whiten beyond surface stains
- Enamel safe for daily use

Boxed Contents: 1 x Teeth Whitening Toothpaste
Size: 85g

Causes of tooth discolouration - certain foods and beverages can cause teeth to become discoloured. These include coffee, tea and wine. Smoking also causes teeth to become discoloured.

Types of teeth stains:
1. Extrinsic Stains - an extrinsic tooth stain is a stain on the outer part of the tooth. These stains make their home on your enamel, which is the layer that protects the softer part of the tooth (dentine) underneath. Enamel comes into contact with everything you eat or drink and can adsorb some of the pigment over time, causing a stain.

2. Intrinsic Stains - intrinsic stains happen when pigments become incorporated in the enamel structure. Dentine is naturally darker and more yellow in colour than enamel. Dentine is more visible when enamel is thinned or worn down from abrasion, which can result from hard toothbrushing; or erosion, which can occur from the ingestion of acidic foods and drinks amongst other things.

Teeth whitening treatments - there are many at-home treatment options available including using a whitening toothpaste, mouthwash or whitening pen. Colgate Optic White toothpastes contain hydrogen peroxide. Hydrogen peroxide works by removing extrinsic and intrinsic stains. Other whitening toothpastes use high cleaning silica, which helps to remove surface stains on the outer layer of the teeth.

*With twice-daily brushing for 4 weeks. Individual results may vary.
  • REVEAL A WHITER LOOKING SMILE: Colgate Optic White Renewal Lasting Fresh is a teeth whitening toothpaste for a whiter smile

  • REMOVES STAINS: Colgate Optic White Renewal toothpaste removes 10 years of yellow stains with twice daily brushing

  • POWERED BY THE TEETH WHITENING INGREDIENT THAT DENTISTS USE: Optic White renewal contains 3% hydrogen peroxide, which is clinically proven to whiten your teeth inside and out

  • ENAMEL SAFE: This teeth whitening toothpaste is enamel safe and suitable for daily use

  • DEEPLY WHITENS: Proven to remove deep set in stains
name: Optic White Teeth Whitening Toothpaste Renewal Lasting Fresh With 3% Hydrogen Peroxide

description: POLIDENT TABLETS RETAINER & MOUTHGUARD 36 PACK
ingredients: Sodium Bicarbonate, Sodium Carbonate Peroxide (Sodium Percarbonate 200mg/g), Citric Acid, Potassium Caroate (Potassium Monopersulfate), Sodium Carbonate, TAED, Sodium Benzoate, PEG-180, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, VP/VA Copolymer, Flavour, Cellulose Gum, Cl42090 Aluminum Lake, Cl 73015, Cl 19140, Cl 19140 Aluminum Lake.
long_description:
We all know that it's important to brush our teeth every day to help keep them clean and healthy. But did you know that your dental appliances can also accumulate stains and bacteria? Use Polident Retainer & Mouthguard Cleanser instead of regular toothpaste. It helps make sure your dental appliance stays clean and fresh, removing* 99.9% of odour causing bacteria**. 

Polident Retainer & Mouthguard Daily Cleanser has been developed with Crystal Clear Technology - to help keep your dental appliance looking clear. The cleaning formulation is designed to lift stains, and remove discolouration and odour-causing bacteria to help maintain the cleanliness, freshness, and transparency of your dental appliance. 

Polident Retainer & Mouthguard Cleanser has been tested and is compatible with a variety of removable dental appliances*** including clear and wired retainers, night guards, mouthguards, gum shields, and removable braces so you can feel confident that your dental appliance will be looked after. 

To use, drop one Polident Retainer and Mouthguard Cleanser tablet into enough very warm (not hot) water to cover your dental appliance. Soak for 3 to 5 minutes before brushing your dental appliance with cleanser solution using a soft brush. Discard the remaining solution immediately after use. Rinse the dental appliance thoroughly with running water before putting it back in your mouth. 

ALWAYS FOLLOW THE DIRECTIONS FOR USE. 
*When used as directed.
**In laboratory tests. Reference: Kiesow, A. et al. (2016) J. Prosthet. Dent. 115(2) 189-198. Sponsored by Haleon.
***Based on testing done on polymethyl methacrylate, stainless steel, cobalt chrome alloys, and ethylene vinyl copolymer.
  • Uses Crystal Clear Technology to lift stains and remove discolouration

  • Removes* 99.9% of odour-causing bacteria** to help freshen breath

  • Convenient, easy-to-use tablets

  • Effective and gentle on most types of dental appliances

  • Maintain the cleanliness, freshness, and transparency of your dental appliance
name: Tablets Retainer & Mouthguard

long_description:
Dig into your favourite foods free of care and full of confidence. Polident Flavour Free Denture Adhesive Cream is free of artificial colours and flavours and gives you triple action strong 12-hour hold, food seal protection and comfort. It helps block out irritating food particles from getting stuck under your full or partial dentures. Just take that bite and enjoy freedom from foods such as nuts, seeds or popcorn sneaking under your denture.

Did you know that applying an adhesive such as Polident Flavour Free can still help enhance your overall denture experience? Become one with your denture and get strong all-day hold.

Best of all, applying and removing is simple: just clean and dry your denture and rinse your mouth. Then refer to pack diagrams for how to apply the product to either partial or full dentures. Next, press your denture into place, holding it firmly. Bite down for a few seconds and you're good to go. To remove, swish your mouth with warm water and then remove denture using a rocking motion. Remove any adhesive residue from your denture and your mouth with a soft brush and warm water.

Boost your partial or full denture care routine and clean with Polident denture cleansing tablets. They remove* 99.9% of odour causing bacteria**. Keep your denture clean and fresh.


*When used as directed.
**In laboratory tests; Kiesow, A. et al. (2016) J. Prosthet. Dent. 115(2);189-98. Financial sponsor: Haleon.
^AU NielsenIQ© & IQVIA, Grocery & Pharmacy Scan Data, Denture Care Category, Value/Unit Sales 52 weeks 20/09/2022.

ingredients: na
long_description:
The Colgate Adult Powered Battery Soft Toothbrush has a spellbinding power of 30,000 brush strokes per minute. The rubber polisher helps to remove surface stains and it has a tongue and cheek cleaner. It brushes away more plaque* (*vs a manual toothbrush).

Includes 1 AA Battery

TO USE: Press on/off button to activate the vibrating bristles with the cleaning power of sonic technology.

TO CLEAN: After use, rinse toothbrush head thoroughly, shake off excess water, and store upright.

TO REPLACE BATTERIES: Firmly hold the bottom of the handle while rotating the top counterclockwise. Insert one AA battery as indicated inside the brush handle and firmly rotate clockwise back into position to close.

TO REPLACE BRUSH HEAD: Gently pull the brush head from the handle and press new brush head into place.

Colgate refill toothbrush heads are compatible with any Colgate battery-powered toothbrush

Dentists and Hygienists recommend replacing your toothbrush refill head every 3 months.

WARNING: For adults and children 8 years and older. Adult supervision required for persons with disabilities. Replace refill brush head if it becomes loose or damaged.

Do not charge battery or put in fire. May explode or leak causing injury

description: JACK N' JILL TOOTHPASTE NATURAL STRAWBERRY 50GRAM
ingredients: Xylitol, Aqua (Purified Water), Glycerin (Coconut derived), Silica, Aroma (Strawberry flavour), Xanthan Gum, Calendula Officinalis Extract, Potassium Sorbate, Citric Acid, Benzyl Alcohol* Made using organic ingredients. 99.8% Natural origin of total. * Naturally occurring in the flavour.
long_description:
WHY IT'S SO AMAZING!

Safe. Fun. Yum!

Brushing with Jack N' Jill Toothpaste helps clean teeth and provides natural protection against cavities.

Our mild gel formulation is fluoride free and suitable from 6 months (when bubs first teeth usually come through). We know little kids don't know how to spit - Jack N' Jill Toothpaste is safe if swallowed when used as directed. With a kaleidoscope of nine yummy organic flavours, toothbrushing time has never been easier or more fun! Ingredients such as xylitol and calendula, plus regular and effective brushing, help to soothe gums and fight tooth decay.

Benefits:

With 40% xylitol, Jack N' Jill Toothpaste helps balance the pH in the mouth. xylitol has also been shown to reduce bacteria trapped in plaque whilst silica gently cleans teeth to help avoid the build-up of plaque. Calendula flower extract helps to naturally soothe gums. It is recommended that your child learns to brush their teeth after each meal to help develop good oral hygiene habits.

Jack N' Jill Natural Certified Toothpaste has received the COSMOS Natural Standard Ecocert certification. Ecocert is the world's leading specialist in certification of sustainable practices and organic products.

Relative Dentin Abrasivity (RDA) is 15 - Low abrasivity.

Natural Certified Toothpaste (Ecocert)

Ecocert COSMOS Natural Standard Ecocert certification

Peta Certified Cruelty Free

Safe if swallowed when used as directed

Organic strawberry flavouring

High in xylitol (40%)

Silica for gentle removal of plaque

Calendula to help soothe gums

Suitable from 6 months +

Made in Australia

Vegan, Gluten Free, Fluoride Free, SLS Free, Dairy Free, Sugar- Free, No artificial colour

Safety Seal with easy open flip top cap

BPA free with minimal recyclable packaging

If you have ever been challenged when trying to brush your little one's teeth, we feel your pain - you're not alone! Toddlers and kids don't have any appreciation of why we brush our teeth, but they do know when something 'tastes spicy'. Jack N' Jill Natural Certified Toothpaste tastes so yummy that you will probably need to put it out of reach in between brushing times. We're serious! Toothbrushing time in your bathroom will be transformed - even with the fussiest of kids! Make toothbrushing easy with Jack N' Jill natural and effective toothpaste.
name: Toothpaste Natural Strawberry

long_description:
Colgate Plax Antibacterial Alcohol Free Mouthwash kills 99.9% of germs and provides 24/7 bad breath control*. Colgate Plax provides a cooling sensation that lasts 10x longer than brushing alone. Use twice daily for a healthier, fresher mouth.

When used after proper brushing and flossing, Colgate Plax mouthwash helps deliver a plaque-control system. It works to further rid the mouth of bacteria that may linger on the tongue and inner cheeks, and helps stop new plaque from forming on and between teeth, as well as just below the gum-line. Colgate Plax forms a protective barrier shield to neutralise the effects of bacteria and plaque for 12 hours.

Start your day with great fresh breath, protecting your mouth from bacteria and plaque for up to 12 hours. Finish your day with Colgate Plax to help ensure better Oral Hygiene and fresher start for the following morning. Clinically tested by dentists.

What is bad breath? Bad breath, also known as Halitosis, is foul-smelling breath.

What causes bad breath? Bad breath (halitosis) can be caused by a number of things including poor oral hygiene, the foods you eat (garlic and onions, in particular), smoking, alcohol, gum disease, diabetes, dry mouth, sinus or throat infections and gastrointestinal issues.

Top 3 ways to treat bad breath:
- Brush teeth twice a day with a fluoride toothpaste and floss daily.
- Use a tongue scraper to eliminate odour-causing bacteria on the tongue.
- Visit the dentist twice a year for cleanings and checkups.

Mouthwash for bad breath: Colgate Plax provides a cooling sensation that lasts 10X longer than brushing alone and offers 24/7 bad breath control, with twice daily use.

Size: 500mL
Flavour: Fresh Tea

*When used twice daily

long_description:
Colgate Savacol Mouthwash Alcohol Free Original Mint is an antiseptic mouth and throat rinse clinically proven to assist in the treatment of gingivitis, with a mint flavour. The antibacterial ingredient in Colgate Savacol mouthwash works to reduce the formation of plaque and aid the treatment of gingivitis.

Mouth Ulcers - may relieve discomfort of mouth ulcers. Rinse 3 times daily.
Dental Plaque & Gingivitis - reduces dental plaque and the incidence of gingivitis. Rinse 2 times daily. For maximum benefit use after brushing and flossing.
Post Dental Treatment - on advice of your dentist only.
Denture Rinse - to prevent denture breath. Rinse daily in addition to denture cleaning.

If red or bleeding gums persist for more than 2 weeks, stop use and seek professional advice from your dentist. Painful, swollen gums, loose teeth and bad breath may be signs of periodontitis, a serious form of gum disease which requires professional treatment. 

Savacol Antiseptic Mouth and Throat rinse Mint contains chlorhexidine gluconate.

ALWAYS READ THE LABEL. CHLORHEXIDINE CAN CAUSE SEVERE ALLERGIC REACTIONS.SEEK IMMEDIATE MEDICAL ASSISTANCE IF THIS OCCURS.

Size: 300mL
Flavour: Mint

long_description:
Boost your confidence with TheraBreath Icy Mint Oral Rinse, a dentist-formulated mouthwash designed to provide a refreshing clean without the use of alcohol. It starts working instantly to target odour-causing bacteria, providing long-lasting freshness without the harsh burn of alcohol. The invigorating icy mint flavour leaves your mouth feeling fresh and revitalised, making it an excellent addition to your daily oral care routine.


- Clinically shown to fight bad breath for 12 hours
- No Alcohol. No Burn. No Colours
- Certified Kosher, Vegan & Gluten Free
- Invigorating icy mint blast with cooling sensation


Powered by Oxygen the non-burning rinse is easy to use and helps keep your mouth feeling clean and refreshed throughout the day. Created in 1993 by Dr. Harold Katz, a dentist and bacteriologist, TheraBreath was originally developed to support his daughter's oral care needs. Today, it is trusted by millions seeking an effective solution to fighting bad breath. Whether you're preparing for an important meeting, a night out, or simply want to feel your best, TheraBreath Icy Mint Oral Rinse helps you feel fresh and confident with every use.
  • FIGHTS BAD BREATH FOR 12 HOURS: Clinically tested formula helps maintain long-lasting fresh breath by fighting odour-causing bacteria. Enjoy confidence throughout the day with this powerful yet gentle mouthwash.

  • DENTIST FORMULATED FOR EFFECTIVE ORAL CARE: Developed by Dr. Harold Katz, this advanced mouthwash is designed to promote optimal oral hygiene. Trusted by millions, it provides a reliable solution for fresh breath.a

  • ALCOHOL-FREE & NON-BURNING FORMULA: Unlike harsh mouthwashes, this gentle formula freshens breath without the burning sensation. Perfect for those seeking an effective yet comfortable oral rinse experience.

  • OXYGEN-POWERED FOR EFFECTIVE BREATH PROTECTION: Powered by Oxygen, this mouthwash starts working instantly to fight bad breath at its source, providing a clean and invigorating feel.

  • REFRESHING ICY MINT FLAVOUR: A cool burst of minty menthol and crisp citrus delivers long-lasting freshness. Free from artificial colours for a clean and invigorating experience.

  • Vegan, Gluten free, Not tested on animals.

  • Halal and Kosher certified.

long_description:
Colgate Peroxyl Oral Hygiene Mouth Rinse is a ready-mixed, non-staining, mint flavoured oral cleanser.

When Peroxyl comes into contact with mouth tissue, oxygen is rapidly released in a pleasant bubbling action. This provides mechanical cleansing which flushes out mouth debris and has an antibacterical effect.

Alcohol free (does not contain ethanol). Oxygenating cleansing action powered by 1.5% w/v Hydrogen Peroxide.

Size: 236mL
Flavour: Mint

Directions for use:
Adults and children over 6 years - Rinse with half a capful (10mL) for 1 minute. Spit out. Use twice daily or as directed by a dentist or doctor.

Children 6-12 years should use under supervision of an adult. Not recommended for use in children under 6 years of age.

description: COLGATE PLAX FRESHMINT MOUTHWASH 250ML
ingredients: Water, Glycerin, Propylene Glycol, Sorbitol, Poloxamer 407, Flavour, Cetylpyridinium Chloride, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Saccharin, Menthol, Citric Acid, CI 42053, CI 15985.
long_description:
Colgate Plax Antibacterial Alcohol Free Mouthwash kills 99.9% of germs and provides 24/7 bad breath control*. Colgate Plax provides a cooling sensation that lasts 10x longer than brushing alone. Use twice daily for a healthier, fresher mouth.

When used after proper brushing and flossing, Colgate Plax mouthwash helps deliver a plaque-control system. It works to further rid the mouth of bacteria that may linger on the tongue and inner cheeks, and helps stop new plaque from forming on and between teeth, as well as just below the gum-line. Colgate Plax forms a protective barrier shield to neutralise the effects of bacteria and plaque for 12 hours.

Start your day with great fresh breath, protecting your mouth from bacteria and plaque for up to 12 hours. Finish your day with Colgate Plax to help ensure better Oral Hygiene and fresher start for the following morning. Clinically tested by dentists.

What is bad breath? Bad breath, also known as Halitosis, is foul-smelling breath.

What causes bad breath? Bad breath (halitosis) can be caused by a number of things including poor oral hygiene, the foods you eat (garlic and onions, in particular), smoking, alcohol, gum disease, diabetes, dry mouth, sinus or throat infections and gastrointestinal issues.

Top 3 ways to treat bad breath:
- Brush teeth twice a day with a fluoride toothpaste and floss daily.
- Use a tongue scraper to eliminate odour-causing bacteria on the tongue.
- Visit the dentist twice a year for cleanings and checkups.

Mouthwash for bad breath: Colgate Plax provides a cooling sensation that lasts 10X longer than brushing alone and offers 24/7 bad breath control, with twice daily use.

Size: 250mL
Flavour: Freshmint

*When used twice daily
  • BAD BREATH CONTROL: Add Colgate Plax to your oral care routine after brushing and flossing each morning and night for 24/7 bad breath control with twice daily use.

  • ANTIBACTERIAL MOUTHWASH: Colgate Plax Antibacterial Mouthwash forms a protective shield to help neutralise the effects of bacteria and plaque for up to 12 hours

  • ALCOHOL FREE: Alcohol free formula, does not contain ethanol

  • CLINICALLY TESTED: by dentists and provides a cooling sensation that lasts 10x longer than brushing alone.

  • MINTY FRESH: Freshmint flavour mouthwash for fresh breath
name: Plax Fresh Mint Mouthwash

ingredients: Water, Glycerin, Xylitol, Sorbitol, Propylene Glycol, Poloxamer 407, Sodium Benzoate, Hydroxyethylcellulose, Methylparaben, Propylparaben, Flavour, Sodium Phosphate, Disodium Phosphate. Sweetened with Xylitol.
long_description:
Biotene Dry Mouth Relief Mouthwash is an oral rinse with a soothing, gentle feel that helps clean, refresh, relieves the feeling of a dry mouth and soothes oral tissues. Biotene contains moisturisers to help relieve mouth dryness. Biotene Dry Mouth Relief Mouthwash is specially formulated to provide immediate relief from the feeling of a dry mouth that lasts for up to 4 hours* while it freshens your breath.

A dry mouth occurs when your mouth does not produce enough saliva to stay moist. Having a dry mouth is more than just uncomfortable. It can impact your overall oral health environment. Biotene Moisturising Gels, Mouthwash and Mouth Sprays are specially formulated to help relieve the feeling of a dry mouth, often caused by medication use.

When used as part of your daily oral health care routine, it is an ideal oral rinse for managing the feeling of a dry mouth. Biotene Mouthwash contains a mouth-moisturising system to provide soothing relief. Its gentle formula refreshes your mouth, and helps maintain a healthy oral environment.

It helps freshen your breath, soothes and moisturises, provides immediate relief from the feeling of a dry mouth that lasts for up to 4 hours*, and best of all, it can be used up to 5 times a day (unless otherwise instructed by a healthcare professional)

*After 28 days use
  • Soothing moisturisation: Immediate relief that lasts up to 4 hours* (After 28 days use)

  • Can be used up to 5 times a day, unless otherwise instructed by a healthcare professional

  • Fresh mint

  • Provides immediate relief from the feeling of a dry mouth

  • Freshens breath

  • Gentle formula.

What is tooth sensitivity?
Sensitivity can occur when the dentine underneath tooth enamel and gums becomes exposed. When exposed dentine comes into contact with hot or cold, sweet or sour, or even your toothbrush, it can trigger the nerve causing a short sharp pain.

long_description:
We believe you deserve a life that's free from tooth sensitivity. That's why helping you to get instant^ relief and lasting protection matters to us - because we're here to keep you smiling.

How does Colgate Sensitive Pro-Relief Multi Protection toothpaste work?
- It works by plugging the channels that lead to sensitive tooth nerves, to block the pain.
- With regular use, it builds a long lasting protective barrier that acts like a seal against sensitivity.

With regular brushing, Colgate Sensitive Pro-Relief Multi Protection toothpaste:
- Fight Cavities
- Remove Plaque
- Promote Gum Health
- Strengthen Enamel
- Remove Surface Stains
- Freshen Breath.

Where does sensitive tooth pain come from?
- Receding gums and damage to your enamel can expose thousands of microscopic channels which lead to your tooth's nerve centre.
- When your teeth make contact with something hot, cold or sweet, sensations are carried down these channels directly to the nerves, causing teeth pain.

For instant relief, apply directly to each sensitive tooth with finger tip and gently massage for 1 minute, up to twice daily.
For lasting relief, apply to a gentle toothbrush making sure to brush all sensitive areas of teeth. Brush twice daily.

Colgate Sensitive Pro-Relief Toothpaste is vegan, sugar free, gluten free and responsibly made*
Pack Size: 110g

For the relief of sensitive teeth. ALWAYS READ THE LABEL AND FOLLOW THE DIRECTIONS FOR USE. Do not swallow. Do not use in children 6 years of age or less. For children 7 to 12 years of age, use only on the advice of a dentist or doctor. Sensitive teeth may indicate an underlying problem that may need prompt care by a dentist if pain persists.

^After application as directed.
*our products are made at Colgate-Palmolive facilities that are increasing energy and water efficiency, driving towards zero waste, striving for no workplace accidents, and adhering to ethical labor practices
  • SENSITIVITY RELIEF: Colgate Sensitive Pro-Relief Multi Protection Toothpaste provides clinically proven instant and lasting relief for sensitive teeth.

  • PRO-ARGIN TECHNOLOGY: Clinically proven amino acid formula with Pro-Argin technology to provide sensitivity relief.

  • MULTI-PROTECTION: With regular brushing, it helps to fight cavities, reduce plaque, promote gum health, strengthen enamel, remove stains and freshen breath.

  • FOR INSTANT RELIEF: Apply directly to each sensitive tooth with finger tip and gently massage for 1 minute, up to twice daily. (Instant relief after application and as directed).

  • LASTING RELIEF: Apply to a gentle toothbrush making sure to brush all sensitive areas of teeth. Brush twice daily.

Enamel is the tooth's thin outer surface that keeps teeth strong, healthy and protects the dentine. Enamel wear is when the outer layer of the teeth erodes, and the underlying yellow dentine is exposed. Acids in everyday foods and drinks can weaken and wear away your tooth enamel. Over time, this can lead to sensitive teeth.

DUAL ACTION ENAMEL PROTECTION + SENSITIVITY RELIEF: Sensodyne Sensitivity & Enamel Mint Toothpaste has a dual action formula which helps restore enamel strength and relieve teeth sensitivity.

HELPS RESTORE ENAMEL STRENGTH: The fluoride optimised formulation helps to restore enamel strength by driving more fluoride into the enamel layer. It starts to actively strengthen enamel from 1st use.

Sensodyne Sensitivity & Enamel Mint Toothpaste contains fluoride for daily enamel protection against acid erosion. It also contains Potassium nitrate that works deep inside the tooth to help calm painful sensitivity and provide 24/7* sensitivity protection.

We believe you deserve a life that's free from tooth sensitivity. That's why helping you to get instant^ relief and lasting protection matters to us - because we're here to keep you smiling.

With regular use, Colgate Sensitive Pro-Relief Enamel Repair Toothpaste:
- Builds a reparative layer that acts like a seal, helping to repair sensitive teeth for lasting protection with twice daily brushing.
- Strengthens and remineralises tooth enamel and protects against cavities
- Remove plaque with brushing and prevents tartar build-up

What is acid erosion and where does it come from?
- Dental erosion is loss of dental enamel caused by direct contact of the teeth with acids from everyday food and drinks.
- Acids can soften and gradually dissolve the minerals in the enamel making teeth thinner, weaker and more sensitive.

Where does sensitive tooth pain come from?
- Receding gums and damage to your enamel can expose thousands of microscopic channels which lead to your tooth's nerve centre.
- When your teeth make contact with something hot, cold or sweet, sensations are carried down these channels directly to the nerves, causing teeth pain.

For instant relief, apply directly to each sensitive tooth with finger tip and gently massage for 1 minute, up to twice daily.
For lasting relief, apply to a gentle toothbrush making sure to brush all sensitive areas of teeth. Brush twice daily.

Colgate Sensitive Pro-Relief Toothpaste is vegan, sugar free, gluten free and responsibly made*
Pack Size: 110g

For the relief of sensitive teeth. ALWAYS READ THE LABEL AND FOLLOW THE DIRECTIONS FOR USE. Do not swallow. Do not use in children 6 years of age or less. For children 7 to 12 years of age, use only on the advice of a dentist or doctor. Sensitive teeth may indicate an underlying problem that may need prompt care by a dentist if pain persists

^After application as directed.

What is tooth sensitivity?
Sensitivity can occur when the dentine underneath tooth enamel and gums becomes exposed. When exposed dentine comes into contact with hot or cold, sweet or sour, or even your toothbrush, it can trigger the nerve causing a short sharp pain.

It helps to repair* the sensitive areas of the teeth. Brush twice a day for lasting sensitivity protection. It also contains fluoride to help strengthen the teeth and has a fresh minty taste to leave your mouth feeling clean and fresh.

description: SENSODYNE REPAIR & PROTECT TOOTHBRUSH
long_description:
The Sensodyne Repair & Protect Toothbrush is a soft toothbrush suitable for people with sensitive teeth. Cleaning effectively is important for people with sensitive teeth to help avoid a build-up of plaque and to help minimise further tooth wear.

What is tooth sensitivity?
Sensitivity can occur when the dentine underneath tooth enamel and gums becomes exposed. When exposed dentine comes into contact with hot or cold, sweet or sour, or even your toothbrush, it can trigger the nerve causing a short sharp pain.

Our Sensodyne Repair & Protect toothbrush has been specially designed for people with sensitive teeth. Gum recession and enamel wear can be caused by overbrushing, and over time this can lead to exposed dentine and sensitive teeth.

Sensodyne Repair and Protect toothbrush with DUOFLEX neck is designed for effective cleaning with 2 x better pressure control, allowing for more flex and better cleaning*. It has a small head with a long DUOFLEX neck for effective reach with 4 outer bristles with 4 fine tips to help clean in hard-to-reach areas. It has curved cut for effective surface cleaning.

*In laboratory tests vs a standard flat trim brush without a ball joint.

Use in conjunction with the Sensodyne Repair & Protect Deep Repair* Toothpaste Range.
  • More flex.~ Less Pressure.~~In laboratory tests vs a standard flat trim brush without a ball joint.

  • 2x Better pressure control~~In laboratory tests vs a standard flat trim brush without a ball joint.

  • Soft Bristles

  • Designed for people with sensitive teeth

  • Use with Sensodyne Repair & Protect Toothpaste

  • #1 Brand for Sensitive Teeth**IQVIA & NielsenIQ RMS Sell Out Service, Toothpaste Sensitive Segment (client defined) Australia Grocery and Pharmacy market MAT to 31/01/2023.
name: Repair & Protect Toothbrush

24 Hour Antibacterial Protection*
3X More Effective at Fighting a Root Cause**
Charcoal formula, with microparticles that helps clean teeth and remove stains.

A multibenefit toothpaste

Helps prevent many oral care issues^. This formula contains a unique system that stabilises our active ingredient and is designed for superior^^ performance.

Brush thoroughly at least twice a day or as directed by your dental professional. Do not swallow. Rinse with a small amount of water. Not recommended for children 6 years or less. long_description:
Colgate Maximum Cavity Protection great regular toothpaste combines liquid calcium and fluoride. This formula is clinically proven to strengthen teeth and repair weak spots in the enamel before cavities start.

- 4 x stronger enamel*
- Calcium boost
- Maximum cavity protection

Fluoride is our greatest defence against tooth decay. By helping to replace the essential minerals that plaque acids erode from the enamel, and with additional calcium, Colgate Maximum Cavity Protection fluoride toothpaste strengthens teeth and helps prevent the decay that may lead to cavities — both on the enamel covered and root surfaces of teeth.

Size: 130g pump

*at 2 weeks mineral change vs regular fluoride toothpaste

  • MAXIMUM CAVITY PROTECTION: Colgate Maximum Cavity Protection Great Regular Toothpaste formula with calcium provide cavity protection to strengthen teeth

  • ACTIVE FLUORIDE FORMULA: fights cavities on teeth surfaces and exposed roots.

  • REMOVES PLAQUE: with brushing and prevents tartar build-up

  • CLINICALLY PROVEN: to strengthen teeth and repair weak spots before cavities start

  • MINTY FRESH: Great Regular Flavour to freshen breath

description: COLGATE OPTIC PRO SERIES TOOTHPASTE 80 GRAM
ingredients: Propylene Glycol, Calcium Pyrophosphate, PVP, PEG/PPG-116/66 Copolymer, Water, Hydrogen Peroxide (5% w/v), Silica, Flavour, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Tetrasodium Pyrophosphate, Sodium Monofluorophosphate, Sodium Saccharin, Disodium Pyrophosphate, Sucralose, BHT. long_description:
Created by whitening experts, Colgate Optic White Pro Series Stain Prevention^ toothpaste contains our highest level of hydrogen peroxide in a teeth whitening toothpaste, 5%. Hydrogen Peroxide is the same whitening ingredient dentists use to whiten teeth.

FEEL IT WORKING. EXPERIENCE A UNIQUE WARMING SENSATION AS YOU BRUSH

It deeply whitens and is enamel safe, removing 15 years of yellow stains* from your smile.

Colgate Optic White Pro Series Toothpaste Provides Expert level whitening for a vibrant glow. Helps to remove stains from coffee, wine and soft drinks.

- Gently whitens teeth from the inside out
- Safe for daily use
- Enamel Safe
- Sugar Free
- Gluten Free
- Vegan

Remove 15 years of Stains* for a smile that will wow your dentist!

Made in a recyclable tube. Does not include cap, please remove before recycling.

Boxed Contents: 1 x Teeth Whitening Toothpaste
Size: 80g

Directions for use:
Brush thoroughly at least twice a day, for at least 2 minutes or as directed by your dental professional. Do not swallow. Rinse with a small amount of water. Do not use for children 6 years of age or less. Some people may experience tooth sensitivity or or gum discomfort when using whitening products. This discomfort is temporary and not harmful. If you experience irritation or more than mild tooth sensitivity, stop use and consult your dental professional.

*with brushing twice daily for 2 weeks. Individual results may vary.
^with daily use, the bleaching ability of hydrogen peroxide will prevent new stains from forming.
#Colgate #toothpaste #Whiteningtoothpaste #teethwhitening #OpticWhite #HydrogenPeroxide
  • REMOVES STAINS: Colgate Optic White Pro Series Stain Prevention Teeth Whitening Toothpaste removes 15 years of stains with twice daily brushing.

  • OUR MOST HYDROGEN PEROXIDE IN A TOOTHPASTE: Colgate Optic White Pro Series Stain Prevention Teeth Whitening Toothpaste contains 5% hydrogen peroxide.

  • STAIN PREVENTION: with daily use, the bleaching ability of hydrogen peroxide will prevent new stains from forming.

  • POWERED BY THE TEETH WHITENING INGREDIENT THAT DENTISTS USE: Optic White Pro Series Teeth Whitening Toothpaste contains 5% hydrogen peroxide, which is proven to whiten your teeth inside and out.

  • ENAMEL SAFE: This teeth whitening toothpaste is enamel safe and suitable for daily use.
name: Optic White Pro Series Teeth Whitening Toothpaste Enamel Safe With 5% Hydrogen Peroxide

description: LYNX DEODORANT BODY SPRAY SUNSET FRESH 165ML
ingredients: Alcohol, Butane, Isobutane, Propane, Fragrance, Zinc Neodecanoate, Isopropyl Myristate, t-Butyl Alcohol, Water.
long_description:
Whether you're heading out for date night or just owning the everyday, Lynx Sunset Fresh Deodorant Body Spray has you covered with an irresistibly fresh and long-lasting scent. Inspired by the golden glow of an Aussie sunset, we've blended refreshing mango and mandarin notes with the signature Lynx effect to create a fragrance you'll keep coming back to. The kind that turns heads without trying and gives that 'walking on the beach at sunset' vibe wherever you go. Just a few spritzes, and you're set with 48 hours of unbeatable confidence and all-over freshness. How to use: Give the can a good shake, hold it 15 cm away from your body and spray in short bursts in a well-ventilated area. Avoid direct inhalation and prolonged spraying. Do not apply to broken or sore skin. Stop use if irritation develops. Not for intimate area use. This deodorant for men is made in Australia and the can is recyclable - please recycle when empty.

From the House of David Beckham, a man who is synonymous with fashion, style, sport and success comes Inspired by Respect Body Spray; infused with the inspirational Green Fougere scent created to celebrate David Beckham as the archetype of a 21st century gentleman. long_description: Looking for an antiperspirant that keeps you feeling fresh and confident all day? Enter Dove Men+Care Fresh Antiperspirant Aerosol. This caring deodorant spray combines powerful 48-hour protection with an instantly fresh feel. Containing  1/4 moisturising cream, the alcohol-free* formula cares for your underarms and shields them from irritation. Your skin is left feeling comfortable with a long-lasting fragrance that keeps you smelling good all day. This antiperspirant deodorant spray is tough on sweat, not on skin, and suitable for everyday use. long_description:
Rexona's Advanced Protection Sport 220mL antiperspirant aerosol deodorant, specially formulated to keep men protected from sweat and odour for up to 72 hours and keep you fresh throughout the day. With body heat activated sweat protection, our products are intelligently designed to work as hard as you do. We make it our business to know more about sweat, and what we learn informs every product innovation. Sweat, also known as perspiration, is a normal and healthy bodily function, and it starts to occur just a few months after birth. We mainly sweat to cool our bodies down, a process called thermoregulation. Our brain sends a signal to over 3 million glands in our body to release sweat (a clear fluid made of water, salts and proteins). As this fluid evaporates from our skin, it lowers our body temperature. On https://www.rexona.com/au, you'll find lots of helpful information about how to stop sweat and how Rexona can help. Rexona entered the world of professional sports, backing some of the world's best sports men and women. To this day, Rexona continues to provide ultimate protection at even the busiest of times. Rexona was created in Australia in 1908 by Mrs Alice Sheffer, the wife of SF Sheffer, the founder of the Sheldon Drug Company. A talented physician, she wanted to give people a new kind of personal care product, with effective ingredients that also smelt good. When Rexona hit the shelves in 1908, it soon became the company's biggest seller

description: DOVE MEN DEODORANT 48HR AEROSOL STAIN DEFENCE 250ML
ingredients: Butane, Isobutane, Propane, Cyclopentasiloxane, PPG-14 Butyl Ether, Aluminum Chlorohydrate, Fragrance, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Octyldodecanol, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Propylene Carbonate, BHT, Dimethiconol.
long_description:
Get the protection and care you need without the deodorant stains you don't with Dove Men+Care Stain Defense Antiperspirant Aerosol. This spray deodorant provides 48 hours of protection against sweat, odour and marks on your clothes, keeping them stain free for longer. Containing moisturising cream, this alcohol-free* formula cares for your underarms and shields them from irritation. Your skin is left feeling comfortable with a long-lasting fragrance that keeps you smelling fresh all day long. This antiperspirant deodorant spray is tough on sweat, not on skin, and suitable for everyday use. Dove Men+Care does not test on animals anywhere in the world, and our Stain Defense Antiperspirant Aerosol is PETA-Approved Vegan.

Dove Men+Care celebrates a new definition of strength: one with care at its centre. Real strength is shown through the care you give to the people that matter - and that includes you.

To ensure complete antiperspirant protection, give the can a good shake, then hold it 15 cm away from your underarm and spray evenly in short bursts in a well-ventilated area. Our deodorant spray is made in Australia with renewable grid electricity and comes in a recyclable metal can - please recycle when empty. Whether you're looking for a deodorant for men to keep you feeling fresh and dry all day or a body wash to help keep your skin hydrated, Dove Men+Care products are designed to protect and care for your skin.

*ethyl alcohol

LYNX Collision Deodorant Body Spray blends fresh notes with warm notes that seem to clash but instead make a fragrance that is oh-so-right. We're talking about notes of leather set up against warm notes of vanilla, cookie, maple syrup and creamy musk. We're talking a head-turning combo that keeps you at the top of your game all day. Better still, our zinc technology fights odour and odour-causing bacteria* to give you 48-hour protection when you need it. 100% fresh fragrance means you'll smell irresistible - even when you sweat.

At LYNX, we're committed to producing styling and grooming products that help guys look better, smell better and feel more confident when taking on the world. We exist to help Australian and New Zealand guys express themselves authentically. For great protection from odour, give the LYNX Collision aerosol can a good shake, twist the cap and spray your underarms and body. Recycle the can when empty.


Take a look at the full range of LYNX body sprays on our website. Our products are also available in gift packs for Christmas and Father's Day.

long_description:
Rexona Women Advanced Protection Antiperspirant Deodorant Watermelon Freeze Roll On 50ml delivers nonstop protection to keep you feeling unstoppable. This antiperspirant deodorant roll-on offers 72-hour nonstop protection, so you can keep moving.

Rexona Women Advanced Protection Antiperspirant Deodorant Watermelon Freeze Roll On
provides ultimate protection at even the busiest of times. It features our breakthrough Body Heat Activated technology that doesn't stop working, no matter how hot you get. Our Body Heat Activated technology keeps you fresh and more protected with 2x stronger protection against sweat vs. a regular antiperspirant. It works with unique microcapsules that sit on the surface of your skin. This powerful antiperspirant deodorant roll on responds when you need it the most so that you can stay confident without having to worry about slowing down. Whether you're having a long day at work, playing sports, working out in the gym, or whatever the day throws at you, you can be confident you'll be protected from sweat and odour by this antiperspirant deodorant. This antiperspirant deodorant roll on works as hard as you do, keeping you protected, so you can keep moving and active. Simply apply Rexona roll on deodorant, enjoy the great fragrance and get moving.

Our roll - on antiperspirant deodorant is intelligently designed to work as hard as you do. We make it our business to know more about sweat, and what we learn informs every product innovation. Sweat, also known as perspiration, is a normal and healthy bodily function, and it starts to occur just a few months after birth. We mainly sweat to cool our bodies down, a process called thermoregulation. Our brain sends a signal to over 3 million glands in our body to release sweat (a clear fluid made of water, salts and proteins). As this fluid evaporates from our skin, it lowers our body temperature.
On Rexona.com/au you'll find lots of helpful information about how to stop sweat and how Rexona can help. Rexona entered the world of professional sports, backing some of the world's best sports men and women. To this day, Rexona roll on antiperspirant deodorant continues to provide ultimate protection at even the busiest of times.

Rexona was created in Australia in 1908 by Mrs Alice Sheffer, the wife of SF Sheffer, the founder of the Sheldon Drug Company. A talented physician, she wanted to give people a new kind of personal care product, with effective ingredients that also smelt good. When Rexona hit the shelves in 1908, it soon became the company's biggest seller.

Rexona antiperspirant deodorant roll on are dermatologically tested and alcohol-free.

This aluminium free deodorant keeps you dry and odour free for up to 48 hours, with the cool, crisp, clean fragrance of cucumber bringing you extra freshness.

But that's not all. Our deodorant goes well beyond simply keeping you protected - it cares for delicate underarm skin too. Created with 0% alcohol and our signature moisturising cream, the formula helps to reduce the irritation caused by shaving, leaving your underarm skin smoother and softer.

So with all those soothing ingredients combined with dryness protection that lasts, what better way is there to start each day?

What is the difference between deodorant and antiperspirant? Both Dove antiperspirant and Dove deodorant keep you feeling fresh and protected from odour all day long. To stay dry all day choose an antiperspirant, as the aluminium salts in the formula help control sweat. long_description:
DOVE MEN+CARE FRESH ROLL ON ANTIPERSPIRANT 50ML
Looking for an antiperspirant that keeps you feeling fresh and confident all day? Enter Dove Men+ Care Fresh Anti-Perspirant Roll On Deodorant.

This caring deodorant roll on combines powerful protection with an instantly fresh feel. The powerful antiperspirant ingredients and advanced moisturiser technology in the formula work to moisturise and help protect skin. Your skin is left feeling comfortable and free from irritation with a long-lasting classic fragrance that keeps you smelling good all day long.

Simply apply the rollerball gently to each underarm. It glides on easily, so you just need to use circular motions to get the best coverage and protection. Do not use on broken skin. Stop use if rash or irritation occurs. Visit our website to get further information on our range, and to explore odour and sweat solutions.

Our products are intelligently designed to work as hard as you do. We make it our business to know more about sweat, and what we learn informs every product innovation. Sweat, also known as perspiration, is a normal and healthy bodily function, and it starts to occur just a few months after birth. We mainly sweat to cool our bodies down, a process called thermoregulation. Our brain sends a signal to over 3 million glands in our body to release sweat (a clear fluid made of water, salts and proteins). As this fluid evaporates from our skin, it lowers our body temperature.

long_description:
Everybody sweats, sure. But not everybody sweats in the same way. Some of us sweat more but still want to live life without the stress of stickiness and sweat patches. That's why we've developed Rexona Women Summer Strength Clinical Protection Antiperspirant, offering 3x more sweat protection than a basic antiperspirant deodorant, with a clean, exotic scent. Advanced Active technology forms an anti-sweat microshield that keeps you fresh, dry and confident for up to 96 hours. Better still, our innovative MotionSense technology releases bursts of fresh, invigorating fragrance when you need it most on those long, hot summer days. It works like this: unique microcapsules sit on the surface of your skin. When you move, friction breaks those microcapsules releasing more fragrance. So, the more you move, the more it protects. When you work hard, Rexona works harder. With a unique blend of skin-moisturising ingredients, the antiperspirant deodorant stick formula is gentle enough for everyday use. Grab this stick deodorant for women to get all-day freshness and 96-hour protection that works in sync with your body for nonstop confidence from morning to night. For optimum sweat protection, apply at night when your sweat glands are less active. Twist the bottom to release the cream with two clicks per underarm and smooth onto each underarm evenly. Rexona gives you all the backup you need. Rexona. It won't let you down. *vs a basic antiperspirant deodorant **ethyl alcohol

long_description:
Nothing quite beats a nice cold shower in the morning to really get us going and help us to feel clean and hygienic, does it? If only we could bottle that feeling and keep it with us all day long, right? Well now you can, with Dove Women Antiperspirant Stick Pomegranate. The super-fresh scent is just what you need to extend that shower-fresh feeling throughout the day. And it isn't just a refreshing scent that makes Dove Women Antiperspirant Stick Pomegranate such a good choice for the start of your day. As well as our reliable Dove antiperspirant deodorant formula, it also contains moisturising cream to help your delicate underarm skin to recover from irritation caused by shaving. You'll have beautifully soft and smooth underarms in just three days. So keep your Dove Women Antiperspirant Stick Pomegranate handy for when you hop out of the shower in the mornings - it's perfect for giving you a bit of added 'zing'. For freshness that lasts all day: it's simple really - just gently move the rollerball in a circular motion over each underarm to ensure you've covered the area completely. At only 40ml, this is the ideal antiperspirant for travelling. Just pop it in your handbag or carry-on luggage for a weekend away.

long_description:
We're most likely to sweat during challenging times when we want to feel our most confident. Perhaps it's the day of a tough meeting that you've been burning the midnight oil to prepare for or one of those occasions where absolutely everything happens at once. Whatever the reason, the solution is the same; Dove Clinical Protection Pomegranate Deodorant. Unlike other leading clinical strength deodorants, Dove Clinical Protection Pomegranate Deodorant contains moisturising cream to help underarm skin recover from irritation caused by shaving for great underarm care. Add in the fact that it's been dermatologically tested and you can be sure that this clinical strength antiperspirant will be kind to your skin while being tough on sweat. Now the only thing you have to worry about is impressing your boss or prioritising your time. Let Dove Clinical Protection Pomegranate Deodorant take care of perspiration while you turn on the charm and enjoy your day. To stay fresh and dry all day, start by twisting the applicator wheel to release the antiperspirant - two clicks for each underarm - then smooth on the product with light, even strokes. You can use Dove Clinical Protection Pomegranate Deodorant in the morning, but for the best results, apply it before bed: your sweat glands are less active at night, and your skin is drier, so the formula can adapt to your body and form its long-lasting barrier ready for the morning.

  • Features a signature pomegranate fragrances to leave you feeling clean, fresh and beautiful

  • Dermatologist tested

  • A unique combination of protection, care and beauty.

long_description:
Dove Men+Care 0% Aluminium Clean Comfort deodorant contains our skin friendly formula with a clean and fresh scent. It is an aluminium-free deodorant with 0% alcohol to keep you odour free and feeling fresh for up to 48 hours.

Dove Men+Care has moisturiser technology to help protect skin against irritation, meaning you benefit from a men's deodorant without aluminium that's tough on odour, not on skin. It also has a clean, subtle and long-lasting scent to keep you feeling fresh and free from body odour. Tough on odour, this deodorant without aluminium has got you covered all day long with 48 hour freshness whilst protecting you against irritation.

What's the difference between deodorant and antiperspirant? To control body odour and feel fresh, Dove Men+Care offers a choice of either antiperspirant or deodorant products, both help to reduce body odour. If you want to prevent wetness and odour, choose a Dove Men+Care antiperspirant deodorant to keep sweat and odour at bay because aluminium salts in antiperspirants help to control the flow of sweat to keep you dry. If wetness is not an issue for you, you can choose to use a Dove deodorant to feel fresh, such as Dove Men+Care 0% Clean Comfort deodorant.

long_description:
Rexona Men Advanced Protection Antiperspirant Deodorant Invisible Dry Fresh Roll On 50ml delivers nonstop protection to keep you feeling unstoppable. This antiperspirant deodorant roll-on offers 72-hour nonstop protection, so you can keep moving.

Rexona Men Advanced Protection Antiperspirant Deodorant Invisible Dry Fresh Roll On provides ultimate protection at even the busiest of times. It features our breakthrough Body Heat Activated technology that doesn't stop working, no matter how much you move. Our Body Heat Activated technology keeps you fresh and more protected with 2x stronger protection against sweat vs. a regular antiperspirant. It works with unique microcapsules that sit on the surface of your skin. This powerful antiperspirant deodorant roll on responds when you need it the most so that you can stay confident without having to worry about slowing down. Whether you're having a long day at work, playing sports, working out in the gym, or whatever the day throws at you, you can be confident you'll be protected from sweat and odour by this antiperspirant deodorant. This antiperspirant deodorant roll on works as hard as you do, keeping you protected, so you can keep moving and active. Simply apply Rexona roll on deodorant, enjoy the great fragrance and get moving.

Our roll - on antiperspirant deodorant is intelligently designed to work as hard as you do. We make it our business to know more about sweat, and what we learn informs every product innovation. Sweat, also known as perspiration, is a normal and healthy bodily function, and it starts to occur just a few months after birth. We mainly sweat to cool our bodies down, a process called thermoregulation. Our brain sends a signal to over 3 million glands in our body to release sweat (a clear fluid made of water, salts and proteins). As this fluid evaporates from our skin, it lowers our body temperature.
On Rexona.com/au you'll find lots of helpful information about how to stop sweat and how Rexona can help. Rexona entered the world of professional sports, backing some of the world's best sports men and women. To this day, Rexona roll on antiperspirant deodorant continues to provide ultimate protection at even the busiest of times.

Rexona was created in Australia in 1908 by Mrs Alice Sheffer, the wife of SF Sheffer, the founder of the Sheldon Drug Company. A talented physician, she wanted to give people a new kind of personal care product, with effective ingredients that also smelt good. When Rexona hit the shelves in 1908, it soon became the company's biggest seller.

Rexona antiperspirant deodorant roll on are dermatologically tested and alcohol-free.

long_description:
Dove Original Deodorant Cream is a convenient, portable applicator shaped to fit the curves of your underarm. It is an effective quick drying cream that is easy to apply. Only Dove offers the most effective ingredients to give you maximum dry protection balanced with 1/4 moisturising cream which takes care of your skin. No other deodorant protects you this way. Maximise the technology of Dove Original Deodorant Cream by applying at night. The key lies in the condition of your skin; not only is your body's perspiration rate higher in the morning, but a hot shower will also open your pores, making it less receptive to any antiperspirant applied afterwards. long_description:
Rexona Men Advanced Protection Antiperspirant Deodorant Invisible Dry Black & White Roll On 50ml delivers nonstop protection to keep you feeling unstoppable. This antiperspirant deodorant roll-on offers 72-hour nonstop protection, so you can keep moving.

Rexona Men Advanced Protection Antiperspirant Deodorant Invisible Dry Black & White Roll On provides ultimate protection at even the busiest of times. It features our breakthrough Body Heat Activated technology that doesn't stop working, no matter how how hot you get. Our Body Heat Activated technology keeps you fresh and more protected with 2x stronger protection against sweat vs. a regular antiperspirant. It works with unique microcapsules that sit on the surface of your skin. This powerful antiperspirant deodorant roll on responds when you need it the most so that you can stay confident without having to worry about slowing down. Whether you're having a long day at work, playing sports, working out in the gym, or whatever the day throws at you, you can be confident you'll be protected from sweat and odour by this antiperspirant deodorant. This antiperspirant deodorant roll on works as hard as you do, keeping you protected, so you can keep moving and active. Simply apply Rexona roll on deodorant, enjoy the great fragrance and get moving.

Our roll - on antiperspirant deodorant is intelligently designed to work as hard as you do. We make it our business to know more about sweat, and what we learn informs every product innovation. Sweat, also known as perspiration, is a normal and healthy bodily function, and it starts to occur just a few months after birth. We mainly sweat to cool our bodies down, a process called thermoregulation. Our brain sends a signal to over 3 million glands in our body to release sweat (a clear fluid made of water, salts and proteins). As this fluid evaporates from our skin, it lowers our body temperature.
On Rexona.com/au you'll find lots of helpful information about how to stop sweat and how Rexona can help. Rexona entered the world of professional sports, backing some of the world's best sports men and women. To this day, Rexona roll on antiperspirant deodorant continues to provide ultimate protection at even the busiest of times.

Rexona was created in Australia in 1908 by Mrs Alice Sheffer, the wife of SF Sheffer, the founder of the Sheldon Drug Company. A talented physician, she wanted to give people a new kind of personal care product, with effective ingredients that also smelt good. When Rexona hit the shelves in 1908, it soon became the company's biggest seller.

Rexona antiperspirant deodorant roll on are dermatologically tested and alcohol-free.

long_description:
Stay fresh all over with Rexona Wild Rose Whole Body Deodorant. This aluminium-free deodorant for women provides 72 hours of odour control so you can overcome your limits. Our whole body deodorant features Rexona's patented Body Adapt Technology, which stops odour before it even starts. This women''s deodorant spray offers a fresh and floral fragrance with a classic, feminine feel. Its quick-drying formula leaves less residue and feels light and refreshing on the skin, providing nearly instant freshness. Use it wherever you need to control odour all over - including your pits, chest, feet and beyond, but excluding your face. Avoid contact with eyes and broken skin. Stop use if rash or irritation occurs. Every part of your body has a unique microbiome, which causes body odour to vary across different areas. Only Rexona Whole Body Deodorant adapts to you - wherever you need it - so you can overcome your limits. Our whole body deodorant sprays work over a large surface area, making them a convenient choice. At Rexona, we want to inspire confidence in everyone to move more and go further. We're here to support your journey with an aluminium-free deodorant spray that keeps you fresh all over. Rexona. It won't let you down.

description: DAVID BECKHAM RESPECT DEODORANT BODY SPRAY 150ML
ingredients: BUTANE-ISOBUTANE-PROPANE, ALCOHOL DENAT., PARFUM/FRAGRANCE, PROPYLENE GLYCOL, TRIETHYL CITRATE, ETHYLHEXYLGLYCERIN, LIMONENE, LINALOOL, BENZYL SALICYLATE, COUMARIN, BHT, GERANIOL, ALPHA-ISOMETHYL IONONE, CITRAL, TOCOPHEROL.
long_description:
From the House of David Beckham, a man who is synonymous with fashion, style, sport and success comes Respect. Respect by David Beckham opens on a luminous blend of zesty grapefruit and juicy watermelon notes juxtaposed with a fiery hit of pink pepper for instant exhilaration. The heart reveals clean and aromatic tones thanks to the fresh fusion of basil and lavendin highlighted by a cool hint of cardamom. This evolves to a deeply masculine dry down with a powerful woody signature that's shaped by the warmth of vetiver, the intensity of patchouli and the deep character of moss.
  • Bold and assured

  • For the genuine modern gentleman

  • Grapefruit Note, Watermelon Note, Pink Pepper

  • Cardamom, Lavandin, Basil Note

  • Vetiver, Patchouli, Mossy Notes

  • A woody aromatic fragrance.
