long_description:
IMPULSE Body Spray Aerosol Deodorant WANDERLUST is an all over perfume. Awaken your senses with the thrill of adventure, and escape to the unknown. A warm tropical fragrance that combines the energy of coffee with hints of sparkling orange flower that will help set you free.

Impulse offers a range of daily fragrances crafted by the world's best fragrance houses. The aerosol spray is in a light, portable design, making the product handy for on the go moments at school, the gym, work and in your overnight bag.

To use: Twist the top cap to unlock, press down on the head of the product and spray it anywhere, any time. For optimal results, hold the can 15 cm from the body and spray.

Impulse is an everyday perfume in a convenient aerosol spray. Familiar yet still uniquely different, Impulse is abandoning the pre-conceived ideas of what a fragrance should be. Designed to suit your personality and busy, on the go lifestyle.

Available in a range of unique scents, perfect to spray on bare skin after hopping out of the shower for an uplifting fragrant boost, and then throw into your handbag to top up your scent throughout the day. Get to know these light, delicious perfume scents that you can spray whenever the mood strikes.
  • Easy and convenient twist, press, spray bottle

  • Impulse offers a range of daily fragrances crafted by the world's best fragrance houses

  • Compact body spray aerosol deodorant for you to carry on the go

  • An uplifting perfume in a spray

  • Fragrance suited to an adventurous personality

  • Body spray with an addictive scent in a recyclable bottle.

This aerosol anti-perspirant features unique patented anti-stain technology that prevents white marks on black clothing and anti-yellow staining on white clothing. Enjoy reliable 72-hour anti-perspirant protection that's strong on sweat and odours whilst caring for your skin. Our unique formula with a delicate floral fragrance protects you and your favourite clothes. The formulas skin tolerance are dermatologically proven and do not contain ethyl alcohol. NIVEA BLACK & WHITE offers a complete protection against sweat, odours, stains, residues and irritations, while being gentle on the skin. Our anti-perspirants offer Derma 72h Active protection: our products are working with the skin, for reliable and strong efficacy against sweat and odour and with kind-to-skin formulations. Also available in roll-on format.

ingredients: Butane, Isobutane, Propane, Cyclopentasiloxane, PPG-14 Butyl Ether, Aluminum Sesquichlorohydrate, Fragrance, Glycine, Helianthus Annuus [Sunflower] Seed Oil, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Water, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Calcium Chloride, Octyldodecanol, BHT, Propylene Carbonate, Dimethiconol, Sodium Starch Octenylsuccinate, Maltodextrin, Hydrolyzed Corn Starch Octenylsuccinate, Silica.
long_description:
Rexona Women Bright Bouquet Advanced Protection Antiperspirant Deodorant Aerosol provides 72 hours of non-stop sweat and odour protection - giving you the confidence to start moving and take on the day.

Our innovative Body Heat Activated technology releases bursts of jasmine and rose fragrance with sweet strawberry notes when you need it most. It works like this: unique microcapsules sit on the surface of your skin. When you move, heat breaks those microcapsules, releasing more fragrance. So, the more you move, the more it protects. When you work hard, Rexona works harder. Grab this antiperspirant deodorant for women to get all-day freshness and 72-hour protection that works in sync with your body for non-stop confidence from morning to night. For optimum sweat protection, apply daily to clean and dry underarms. To use, shake well and spray 15 cm away from underarms, then you're good to go - no need to reapply. Rexona gives you all the backup you need. Rexona. It won't let you down.

As part of our efforts to move together for a sustainable future, we're increasing our use of reusable materials and making it easier for you to recycle our packaging. Our deodorant spray is made in Australia with renewable grid electricity and comes in a recyclable aluminium can - please recycle when empty.

*ethyl alcohol

long_description:
Rexona Women Advanced Protection Invisible Dry Pure Antiperspirant Deodorant provides nonstop protection to keep you feeling unstoppable. Everyone sweats - it's normal and healthy. But it shouldn't hold you back or slow you down. And that's where our Advanced Protection range comes in with 72 hours of powerful sweat and odour protection to keep you moving with confidence.

Our Invisible Dry Pure antiperspirant deodorant features Body-Heat Activated activated sweat protection that keeps working, no matter how much you move. It responds when you need it most, keeping you perfectly dry and patch-free. In short, whether you're having a long day at work, playing sports, working out in the gym or whatever the day throws at you, you can be confident you'll be protected from sweat and odour with our tried and trusted antiperspirant deodorant for women.

Our Advanced Protection antiperspirant deodorants work as hard as you do, keeping you protected and fresh so you can keep moving and stay active. Simply spray and get moving. It's that easy. At Rexona, we believe in moving together for a sustainable future. That's why all of our Advanced Protection deodorant cans are 100% recyclable and made in Australia using renewable electricity.

Rexona. It won't let you down.

long_description:
IMPULSE Body Spray Aerosol Deodorant ROMANTIC SPARK is a love story of wild violets and warm earthy woods. It's a fragrance embodying the current of electricity that prompts two total strangers to feel as though they have met before. Thrillingly floral, poetically feminine and above all, passionate. Some call it chemistry. Some call it magic.

Impulse offers a range of daily fragrances crafted by the world's best fragrance houses. The aerosol spray is in a light, portable design, making the product handy for on the go moments at school, the gym, work and in your overnight bag.

To use: Twist the top cap to unlock, press down on the head of the product and spray it anywhere, any time. For optimal results, hold the can 15 cm from the body and spray.

Impulse is an everyday perfume in a convenient aerosol spray. Familiar yet still uniquely different, Impulse is abandoning the pre-conceived ideas of what a fragrance should be. Designed to suit your personality and busy, on the go lifestyle.

Available in a range of unique scents, perfect to spray on bare skin after hopping out of the shower for an uplifting fragrant boost, and then throw into your handbag to top up your scent throughout the day. Get to know these light, delicious perfume scents that you can spray whenever the mood strikes.
  • Easy and convenient twist, press, spray bottle

  • Impulse offers a range of daily fragrances crafted by the world's best fragrance houses

  • Compact body spray aerosol deodorant for you to carry on the go

  • An uplifting perfume in a spray

  • Fragrance suited to a feminine and passionate personality

  • Body spray with an addictive scent in a recyclable bottle.

description: REXONA WOMEN DEODORANT 72HR ADVANCED WATERMELON FREEZE 220ML
ingredients: Butane, Isobutane, Propane, Cyclopentasiloxane, PPG-14 Butyl Ether, Aluminum Sesquichlorohydrate, Fragrance, Glycine, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Water, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Calcium Chloride, Octyldodecanol, BHT, Propylene Carbonate, Dimethiconol, Sodium Starch Octenylsuccinate, Maltodextrin, Hydrolyzed Corn Starch Octenylsuccinate, Silica.
long_description:
Rexona Women Watermelon Freeze Advanced Protection Antiperspirant Deodorant provides 72 hours of nonstop sweat and odour protection - giving you the confidence to start moving and take on the day. Our innovative Body-Heat Activated technology releases bursts of sweet watermelon fragrance with fresh cactus water notes, just when you need it most. It works like this: unique microcapsules sit on the surface of your skin. When you move, friction breaks those microcapsules, releasing more fragrance. So, the more you move, the more it protects. When you work hard, Rexona works harder. Grab this antiperspirant deodorant for women to get all-day freshness and 72-hour protection that works in sync with your body for nonstop confidence from morning to night. For optimum sweat protection, apply daily to clean and dry skin. To use, shake well and spray 15 cm away from underarms, then you're good to go - no need to reapply. Rexona gives you all the backup you need. Rexona - it won't let you down. As part of our efforts to move together for a sustainable future, we're increasing our use of reusable materials and making it easier for you to recycle our packaging. Our deodorant spray is made in Australia with renewable grid electricity and comes in a recyclable aluminium can - please recycle when empty.
*ethyl alcohol
